name: Asian Hot-Que Grill Sauce for Chicken, Beef or Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 To 3 teaspoons Asian chile-paste with garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chile paste in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Turn off heat.
4. Stir in chile paste.
5. Makes 1 1/4 cups.
6. To use: Brush on chicken, beef or pork while grilling.
